title: Olemp
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Olemp''''' was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]. At the [[Second Battle of Bilbringi]] it housed [[Twin Suns Squadron]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
